text_blocks.text: Many Han Chinese and Khitan defected
to the Mongols to fight against the Jin. Two Han Chinese
leaders, Shi Tianze, Liu Heima (Liu Liu Ni), and the
Khitan Xiao Zhala (Xiao defected and commanded the 3
Tumens in the Mongol army. Liu Heima and Shi Tianze
served Ogodei Khan. Liu Heima and Shi Tianxiang led
armies against Western Xia for the Mongols. There were 4
Han Tamens and 3 Khitan Tumens, with each Tumen
consisting of 10,000 troops. The three Khitan Generals
(Xiao commanded the three Khitan Tumens and the four
Han Generals Zhang Rou, Yan Shi, Shi Tianze, and Liu
Heima commanded the four Han tumens under Ogodei
